name: How can I stop mold from coming back after remediation?

mainEntity.name: How can I stop mold from coming back after remediation?

acceptedAnswer.text: To prevent mold from returning, you must stop water infiltration, keep indoor humidity below 50%, use dehumidifiers in damp areas, fix water damage immediately, and ensure proper ventilation in attics and crawl spaces. Regular maintenance of your HVAC system and cleaning of drain lines are also critical.
acceptedAnswer.description: Stop water leaks, keep humidity under 50%, use dehumidifiers, fix damage quickly, and ventilate damp areas.

description: Stop water leaks, keep humidity under 50%, use dehumidifiers, fix damage quickly, and ventilate damp areas.
